skillActions.description: Review or expand the manifest-backed operator/admin surface safely.
Use structured runtime inspection before deeper surgery.
Verify front-door ownership and worker isolation.
Keep workflow, contract, and routing surfaces aligned.
Review runtime-owned email identities and validate their approval boundaries.
Turn repo changes into explicit browser-proof plans for downstream operator surfaces.
